title: デビュー戦の後に・運命のレース

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Trainer, see that? I got through the whole
race. My lucky powers went to work right away!
Sweet victory!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It sure was! It was like a path of light was guiding
me on the turf, saying, "Come this way! Woof,
woof!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I've made my debut... But that means I'm only just
getting started, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then. Please do me the honor of deciding
the next race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...That's probably what you expected me to say,
right? But why don't we let divination do the work
for us?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I guess you could say this is how I like
to spice things up.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay, here goes. Whatever it says on the fortune
slip, that'll be my next race. It's all up to luck
today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like our next goal is the Yayoi Sho.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Yayoi Sho! After running 2,000 meters
through the Nakayama spring greenery, I'll
emerge as a beautiful flower!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like our next goal is the Spring Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Spring Stakes! Who will be first to cover
those 1,800 meters in Nakayama and take the
crown of budding flowers?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like our next goal is the Mainichi Hai.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Mainichi Hai! A 1,800-meter race in Hanshin.
Since it's a G3 race, it should be within reach.
This is a chance to put all that everyday hard
work to the test!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's go with that! Hehehe, I'm starting to get all
pumped up!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's not arbitrary! We're not doing this for show,
you know!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: We are following the will of the gods to the letter. Besides, you're the one who pulled the slip!
